# Support

Thanks for using `@sigx/daisyui`! Here's how to get help.

## Questions and discussions

For usage questions, ideas, and general discussion, please use
[GitHub Discussions on `signalxjs/core`](https://github.com/signalxjs/core/discussions).
It keeps cross-package conversations searchable for everyone.

## Bug reports and feature requests

If you've hit a reproducible bug or want to propose a new feature, open an
issue with the relevant template:

- [Report a bug](https://github.com/signalxjs/daisyui/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml)
- [Request a feature](https://github.com/signalxjs/daisyui/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml)

Before filing, please:

- Check existing [issues](https://github.com/signalxjs/daisyui/issues?q=is%3Aissue) to avoid duplicates.
- Include the affected version, a minimal reproduction, and what you expected versus what happened.

## Security vulnerabilities

**Please do not open a public issue for security problems.** See
[SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for the private reporting process.

## Contributing

Pull requests are very welcome — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for
how to set up the workspace, run tests, and the pre-push checklist.

## Status

`@sigx/daisyui` is in early public release (`0.4.x`). The API surface is small
and stabilising; feedback is especially valuable right now.
